message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  BoxBorderColor #7A7A7A
  BoxBackgroundColor #DFF7DF
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupFontStyle bold
  GroupHeaderFontStyle bold
  GroupHeaderFontSize 18
  MessageFontSize 18
  ParticipantFontSize 20
  TitleFontSize 18
}

participant "Smart\nProxy" as SP #9AA0FF
participant "3Scale" as TS #E6E6E6

box "Insights operator" #DFF7DF
  participant "Control logic" as CL #E6E6E6
  database "IO memory cache" as CACHE
end box

participant "CRD" as CRD #E6E6E6
participant "OCP\nWebConsole" as OCP #E6E6E6

== Pulling data from Smart Proxy ==

CL -> TS : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
TS -> SP : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
SP -> TS : Recommendations\nfor cluster
TS -> CL : Recommendations\nfor cluster

== Exposing recommendations ==

CL -> CACHE : Store\nrecommendations
CACHE -> CRD : Expose\nrecommendations

== Pulling from OCP WebConsole ==

OCP -> CRD : Read\nrecommendations
CRD -> OCP : Here are\nrequired data

@enduml
```
